name: trace_window_undo
description: v2.7.3 W3 stub (profile lands in W3): commit a window change that takes the IN-PLACE reconcile branch (nothing enters/leaves, group identity survives), then Ctrl+Z -> exactly ONE undo step restores the previous window AND geometry together (tags + shapes in one entry, SR-WIN-27/SR-SMO-08); then perform a +1d nudge -> the scene cache must NOT re-apply the undone window (PP_DOC drift probe re-syncs the cache after the external undo; review M2): dump asserts windowStart/End still the restored values and the nudged bar's geometry is coherent with the restored projection.
